cases.prompt: How do I set up a PostPolicy so only the owner can update and admins bypass everything?
cases.expect: references core-auth.md policy guidance: before() admin short-circuit, owner check, authorizeResource

cases.prompt: I need to issue API tokens with scoped abilities for a mobile app
cases.expect: references sanctum.md: createToken with abilities, tokenCan check, auth:sanctum middleware

cases.prompt: Build an OAuth2 authorization server so third-party apps can access my API
cases.expect: references passport.md: authorization code + PKCE, client credentials, scope middleware, not password grant for third-party

cases.prompt: Add 'Sign in with Google and GitHub' social login
cases.expect: references socialite.md: provider config, redirect/callback controller, validateProvider, provider/provider_id migration
